prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild hall with warm wood interior and cozy lighting. A feminine crafter wearing a rolled-sleeve apron and ash-marked gloves stands before a masculine guild coordinator in a formal cloak. The crafter presents a sealed quest parcel to the coordinator with both hands, performing a clear, deliberate handoff motion. Background features a lively, blurred guild hall. No text, no watermark, consistent anime art style.

Same continuous guild hall shot. The masculine coordinator in a formal cloak accepts the sealed parcel from the crafter. Both characters perform a polite, slight bow to each other to finalize the transaction. Warm anime RPG lighting, consistent character appearance, and cozy atmosphere maintained. No text, no watermark.
